flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 76% at Universidad Central de Bayamon vs the 2003–2007 baseline (594 vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Universidad Central de Bayamon fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (2.3k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Universidad Central de Bayamon fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Universidad Central de Bayamon rose 66% between 2021 and 2024 (8.1% → 13.4%).
